name: Hazelnut Semifreddo

ingredients.item: hazelnuts, toasted and skin removed, as described on Torta alle Nocciole e Cioccolato Amaro

method: Serves 6 250 g caster sugar 300 g hazelnuts, toasted and skin removed, as described on Torta alle Nocciole e Cioccolato Amaro 2 organic eggs, separated 600 ml thickened cream 2 tablespoons Nocino liqueur or oloroso sherry melted dark chocolate, to serve (optional)

In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until they form stiff peaks but are not dry. Fold into the praline mixture. Spoon the mixture into a rectangular dish. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze for at least 4 hours, or overnight.
